3261220.name: Shadows Of Serenity Demo
3261220.description:
Follow the path of Eric, a programmer haunted by his past, as he battles his traumas and searches for his purpose. Fight, converse, hack, program and explore his fragmented memories in this technological and psychological adventure featuring turn-based combat and a realistic take on tech. Uncover the secrets of his mind and master the art of hacking to shape his fate.

Programming / Hacking

Use realistic software and custom made programming language to make programs, traverse local networks and hack into locked places.

Getting accustomed to available technology will help you hack various devices around you and get into places you were not supposed to get to.

Energy Management

Energy is essential resource in progressing through the game. Spend motivation on eating, drinking and other activities to increase your energy, complete dreams to increase your motivation.

Dialogues

Use complex web of branching dialogues. Some choices are available from the start, some require further progressions and others will require spending energy and/or increasing your stats.

Turn Based Combat

When words are not enough, resolve conflicts by using a turn based combat system with deck building mechanics.
3261220.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
